title: SCBE coding agent Qwen Stage 6 boss DPO on top of v8 SFT LoRA
description: Cheap informative experiment: pair the existing 168-row stage6_boss_retry_v1 DPO data with v8 SFT LoRA as base_adapter_repo. v8 trained pure SFT (4210 rows, frozen-gate 0/5). v1 DPO data (chosen=required-tokens checklist + canonical vocab + echo discipline; rejected=paraphrase/over-application) was designed for a different SFT base but the failure modes overlap. If this combination passes the frozen gate, no v9 generation is needed. If it fails informatively, v9 plan stays.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal command-line coding agent. Preserve byte/hex evidence, semantic workflow intent, resource-budget routing, and training-boundary governance as separate lanes. When exact gate markers are required, start with a required-token checklist and then explain the route.

evaluation.notes: Production path test: model output is evaluated through a GeoSeal-style required-token scaffold (constrained decoding at gate time). This is intentional and matches the deployed agent path.
